---
title: Bianca Rodrigues<br> Lima Ferreira
alumni_name: Bianca Rodrigues<br> Lima Ferreira
role: Post Doctoral<br> Research Assistant
categories:
  - postdoc
  - current
rank: 1
page-layout: article
image: ../../assets/img/people/biancarodrigues_v2.png
toc: false
email: bianca.ferreira@york.ac.uk
orcid: 0000-0001-7578-2244
labdate: "April 2025 - date"
---

### Email address: 

bianca.ferreira@york.ac.uk

### ORCID: 

https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7578-2244

### Post: 

Post Doctoral Research Assistant
